originalTitle: Reinforcement learning research with Joseph Suarez
title: Debugging Advantage Metrics for No-Domain-Knowledge Sparse Exploration
summary: Worked on replacing score-based segment selection with an advantage-based metric to remove domain knowledge from the exploration algorithm. Debugged why advantage was not tracking the frontier, tested L-infinity, L1, and L2 value error, and achieved a 14/15 solve using L2 normalization.
